category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/pyenv/pyenv describes pyenv as simple Python version management.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project name pyenv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface linked by source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes shell-based Python version switching.
